IGUI_NR_ModOptions_Window_Tooltip: Enable the NeatUI-themed version of this window. The global toggle above must also be enabled.
IGUI_NR_ModOptions_UseNeatRoccoUI_Toolti: Replace the vanilla panel with the NeatUI-themed version.
IGUI_NR_ModOptions_BgAlpha_Tooltip: Controls the opacity of all window backgrounds (0.1 = transparent, 1.0 = opaque).
IGUI_NR_ModOptions_CollapseThreshold_Too: Number of frames the mouse must stay outside a collapsed panel before it auto-hides. Vanilla uses 20.
IGUI_NR_ModOptions_ConvertToRT_Tooltip: Show the estimated run time in real-time hours and minutes, adjusted for the day length.
IGUI_NR_ModOptions_ShowPerGenOverlay_Too: Highlight the power range of the focused generator.
IGUI_NR_ModOptions_PerGenColor_Tooltip: Color used for the focused generator range overlay.
IGUI_NR_ModOptions_ShowUnionOverlay_Tool: Highlight the combined power range of all active generators.
IGUI_NR_ModOptions_UnionColor_Tooltip: Color used for the combined power range overlay.
